summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; each open PR was classified independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No closure, merge, fix, or security-route action is recommended.

actions.reason: Independent open PR requiring normal maintainer review; no duplicate, supersession, low-signal, or security-sensitive evidence supports a close action.
Independent open PR with failed proof/boundary checks and merge-risk labels; not safe to close or merge in this plan-only inventory shard.
Independent open PR with an unresolved changes-requested review and failing guard check; no safe close action is supported by the hydrated artifact.
Independent draft/stacked PR with dirty merge state and broad maintainer-owned work; keep open for maintainer workflow rather than closing from inventory.
Independent open PR with a failed proof check; not duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, low-signal, or merge-ready under the job gates.
